UNITED STATES SECURITIES AND EXCHANGE COMMISSION
FORM 10-Q

 

PART I. FINANCIAL INFORMATION
Item 1.Financial Statements

The accompanying condensed consolidated financial statements of Example Corp were prepared in accordance with U.S. GAAP.

Net sales for the quarter were $1,234 million, an increase of 5% year over year.

Item 2.Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations

The Company's total net sales increased 5% or $61 million during the third quarter of 2026 compared to the same quarter in 2025.

Gross margin percentage increased during the third quarter of 2026 compared to the same quarter in 2025, primarily driven by cost savings.

Item 3.Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk

There have been no material changes to the Company's market risk during the third quarter of 2026.

Item 4.Controls and Procedures

Based on an evaluation as of the end of the period, our principal executive officer and principal financial officer concluded our disclosure controls were effective.

PART II. OTHER INFORMATION
Item 1.Legal Proceedings

The Company is subject to various legal proceedings and claims that arise in the ordinary course of business.

Item 1A.Risk Factors

The Company's business, reputation, results of operations, financial condition and stock price could be materially and adversely affected by a number of risks and uncertainties, including those described below.

Global and regional economic conditions could materially adversely affect the Company's business, results of operations, financial condition and growth.

Item 6.Exhibits

The exhibits listed in the accompanying Exhibit Index are filed as part of this report.
